name: Mekansm
description: A glowing jewel formed out of assorted parts that somehow fit together perfectly.

abilities.name: Restore
abilities.description: Restores health to nearby allies on cast. Cooldown: 50. Mana Cost: 100. Radius: 1200. Heal: 250. Stack Limit Duration: 49.

abilities.name: Mekansm Aura
abilities.description: Grants an aura that increases the health regeneration of nearby ally units. Radius: 1200. Health Regeneration Bonus: 2.5. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.
